title: What is Growth Strategy and Future Prospects of UiPath Company?
text: UiPath's growth strategy focuses on leveraging agentic AI and automation platform for enterprise transformation. Company's business model evolution shows transition from legacy RPA provider to comprehensive automation and agentic AI platform. Growth drivers include: 1) Expansion of AI product adoption - nearly $200M ARR in agentic, IDP, and Maestro products in recent quarters with 90% of >$1M ARR customers using AI products, 2) ARR growth accelerating among larger customers with >$1M ARR spending 3x more than those without AI products, 3) Strategic partnerships with Microsoft, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, Snowflake expanding platform capabilities, 4) Market expansion opportunities in government and regulated industries through on-premises agentic capabilities. Financial metrics support growth thesis with full-year profitability achieved in FY2026 and strong cash generation. Non-GAAP operating margins expanding toward 30% target. Revenue guidance for FY2027 projects $1.754-1.759B, representing 11-13% growth. Company recognition as Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for seventh consecutive year validates market positioning.
